name: ReportFraudScamSpam
description: Customer wants to verify the legitimacy of a communication they received, report a scam or phishing attempt, or report that their account has been compromised or accessed without authorisation. This covers email/call/text verification, fraud reporting, and account security breaches.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to report a {fraudType}
I think my account has been {fraudType}
Can you check if this email I received is genuine?
I got a suspicious text claiming to be from Virgin Media
Someone has accessed my account without my permission
How do I report a scam?
I received a {fraudType} asking for my personal details
My account has been hacked — what do I do?
Is this message from you or is it a scam?
I think someone has stolen my identity using my Virgin Media account
I've noticed {fraudType} on my account
There are charges on my account that I didn't make — I think it's fraud
I clicked on a link in an email and now I'm worried my account is compromised
Can you verify if this phone number that called me is from Virgin Media?
Someone is pretending to be Virgin Media and asking for my bank details
I've been getting {fraudType} about my Virgin account
How do I know if an email from Virgin Media is real?
I think my account security has been compromised
I gave my details to someone I now think was a scammer
Report {fraudType} on my account
Someone changed my account details without my knowledge
fraud on my account
